title: bromus erectus subsp. stenophyllus
intro: Bromus erectus subsp. stenophyllus, also known as the slender brome, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bromus erectus subsp. stenophyllus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a herbal smoke for its therapeutic properties.
